heading: Next Steps
body:
- Review the [API changelog](versioned-api-changelog), which
  gives you visibility into all API (Application Programming Interface) changes across different versions.

- Review the [API Specification](atlas/reference/api-resources-spec), which contains information for all
  stable and deprecated resource versions.

- Follow the steps in the [Migration Guide](atlas-migrate-api-version) to migrate from the current unversioned
  Atlas Administration API to the new versioned Atlas Administration API.
